info.name: Healthcare API
info.description:
Full CRUD API for the Healthcare platform.

**Base URL**: `https://ri8zkgmzlb.execute-api.us-east-1.amazonaws.com`

## Resources
- Customers
- Departments
- Doctors
- Hospitals
- Insurance Companies
- Insurance Policies

## Pagination
All `GET /resource` list endpoints support:
- `?limit=N` â€” items per page (default 20, max 100)
- `?lastKey=<token>` â€” paste the `lastKey` from a previous response to get the next page

## Filtering
- `GET /departments?hospitalId=<id>` â€” filter departments by hospital
- `GET /insurance-policies?companyId=<id>` â€” filter policies by insurance company

## ID Generation (server-side)
IDs are generated automatically on POST. You do NOT send them in the body.

item.name: Customers
item.description:
CRUD operations for customer records.

**Schema**
| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| customerId | String | auto | PK, generated server-side |
| customerName | String | âś… | |
| email | String | âś… | |
| gender | String | âś… | |
| age | Number | âś… | |
| uhid | String | âś… | Unique Health ID |
| policyId | String | âťŚ | FK â†’ InsurancePolicy |
| visits | Array | âťŚ | List of `{hospitalId, departmentId, doctorId}` |
| createdAt | String | auto | ISO-8601 datetime |

request.description:
Returns a paginated list of all customers.

Response includes `lastKey` when more pages exist â€” pass it as `?lastKey=<value>` to fetch the next page.

response.name: 200 OK â€” First Page

query.description: Paste the lastKey value from the previous response here to get the next page

request.description:
Demonstrates cursor-based pagination.

1. Call `GET /customers?limit=5` â†’ get response with `lastKey`
2. Call `GET /customers?limit=5&lastKey=<value from step 1>` â†’ next page
3. When response has no `lastKey`, you've reached the last page.

response.name: 200 OK â€” Last Page (no lastKey = end of results)

request.description:
Creates a new customer. `customerId` and `createdAt` are generated server-side.

**Required**: `customerName`, `email`, `gender`, `age`, `uhid`
**Optional**: `policyId`, `visits`

response.name: 201 Created
response.body:
{
  "customerId": "customer_id_a3f9c",
  "customerName": "Arjun Mehta",
  "email": "arjun.mehta@example.com",
  "gender": "Male",
  "age": 42,
  "uhid": "UHID4455667",
  "policyId": "insurancecomp_1sl5nrfok5_policy_wh0o47kmv3",
  "visits": [
    {
      "hospitalId": "hospital_apollo_hospitals_jubilee_hills_500033",
      "departmentId": "department_id_1ut13",
      "doctorId": "doctor_id_abc12"
    }
  ],
  "createdAt": "2026-03-01 09:45:12"
}

response.name: 400 Bad Request â€” Missing required fields
200 OK
response.body:
{
  "customerId": "customer_id_06kzw",
  "customerName": "Ravi Kumar",
  "email": "ravi.kumar@example.com",
  "gender": "Male",
  "age": 34,
  "uhid": "UHID1234567",
  "policyId": "insurancecomp_1sl5nrfok5_policy_wh0o47kmv3",
  "visits": [],
  "createdAt": "2026-02-15 10:23:45"
}

response.name: 404 Not Found

request.description:
Partially updates a customer. Only send the fields you want to change.

**Updatable fields**: `customerName`, `email`, `gender`, `age`, `policyId`, `visits`, `uhid`

`customerId` and `createdAt` are immutable.

response.name: 200 OK â€” Returns full updated record
response.body:
{
  "customerId": "customer_id_06kzw",
  "customerName": "Ravi Kumar Updated",
  "email": "ravi.updated@example.com",
  "gender": "Male",
  "age": 35,
  "uhid": "UHID1234567",
  "policyId": "insurancecomp_1sl5nrfok5_policy_wh0o47kmv3",
  "visits": [],
  "createdAt": "2026-02-15 10:23:45"
}

request.description: Deletes a customer by ID. Returns the deleted record.

response.name: 200 OK â€” Returns deleted record
response.body:
{
  "message": "Customer 'customer_id_06kzw' deleted.",
  "deleted": {
    "customerId": "customer_id_06kzw",
    "customerName": "Ravi Kumar Updated",
    "email": "ravi.updated@example.com",
    "gender": "Male",
    "age": 35,
    "uhid": "UHID1234567",
    "policyId": null,
    "visits": [],
    "createdAt": "2026-02-15 10:23:45"
  }
}

item.name: Departments
item.description:
CRUD operations for departments within hospitals.

**Schema**
| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| departmentId | String | auto | PK |
| departmentName | String | âś… | |
| hospitalId | String | âś… | FK â†’ Hospital |
| departmentDescription | String | âťŚ | |
| listOfDoctorIds | Array | âťŚ | List of doctorId strings |
| createdAt | String | auto | |

**Filtering**: `GET /departments?hospitalId=<id>` filters by hospital.

request.description: Returns all departments (paginated, default 20 per page).

response.name: 200 OK

item.name: List Departments â€” Filter by Hospital

query.description: Filter departments belonging to a specific hospital

request.description:
Filters departments by `hospitalId`. Only departments in that hospital are returned.

Combine with `limit` and `lastKey` for pagination within the filtered set.

response.name: 200 OK â€” Filtered results
201 Created
response.body:
{
  "departmentId": "department_id_b2c4e",
  "departmentName": "Department of Cardiology",
  "hospitalId": "hospital_apollo_hospitals_jubilee_hills_500033",
  "departmentDescription": "Advanced cardiac care and interventional procedures.",
  "listOfDoctorIds": ["doctor_id_abc12"],
  "createdAt": "2026-03-01 11:00:00"
}

request.description: Partial update â€” only send the fields you want to change.

item.name: Doctors
item.description:
CRUD operations for doctors.

**Schema**
| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| doctorId | String | auto | PK |
| doctorName | String | âś… | |
| about | String | âťŚ | Bio / description |
| records | Array | âťŚ | Medical records list |
| createdAt | String | auto | |

response.name: 200 OK

query.description: Return only 3 doctors â€” useful for UI cards/grids

request.description: Returns only 3 doctors. If there are more, the response includes `lastKey` which you pass as `?lastKey=<value>` to get the next batch.

response.name: 201 Created
response.body:
{
  "doctorId": "doctor_id_f4a2b",
  "doctorName": "Dr. Priya Iyer",
  "about": "Neurologist specialising in epilepsy and movement disorders with 10 years of experience at AIIMS.",
  "records": [],
  "createdAt": "2026-03-01 12:30:00"
}

item.name: Hospitals
item.description:
CRUD operations for hospitals.

**Schema**
| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| hospitalId | String | auto | PK |
| hospitalName | String | âś… | |
| address | String | âś… | |
| phoneNumber | String | âś… | |
| location | String | âťŚ | |
| services | Array | âťŚ | List of service name strings |
| departmentIds | Array | âťŚ | FK list â†’ Department |
| insuranceCompanyIds | Array | âťŚ | FK list â†’ InsuranceCompany |
| createdAt | String | auto | |

response.name: 200 OK

query.description: Token from previous page's lastKey field

body.raw:

item.name: Insurance Companies
item.description:
CRUD operations for insurance companies.

**Schema**
| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| insuranceCompanyId | String | auto | PK |
| insuranceCompanyName | String | âś… | |
| description | String | âťŚ | |
| services | String | âťŚ | |
| createdAt | String | auto | |

response.name: 200 OK
201 Created
response.body:
{
  "insuranceCompanyId": "insurancecomp_k8x3m2pqr1",

item.name: Insurance Policies
item.description:
CRUD operations for insurance policies belonging to a company.

**Schema**
| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| policyId | String | auto | PK â€” format: `{companyId}_policy_{uuid}` |
| companyId | String | âś… | FK â†’ InsuranceCompany |
| about | String | âťŚ | Markdown description of the plan |
| createdAt | String | auto | |

**Filtering**: `GET /insurance-policies?companyId=<id>` returns only policies for that company.

response.name: 200 OK

item.name: List Insurance Policies â€” Filter by Company

query.description: Filter policies belonging to this insurance company

request.description:
Returns only policies issued by the specified insurance company.

Use this to show all plans available under a given company. Combine with `lastKey` for pagination.

**Example flow**:
1. User selects an insurance company from the list
2. Call `GET /insurance-policies?companyId=<selected_id>` to show their plans

response.name: 200 OK â€” Policies for one company

body.raw:
{
  "companyId": "insurancecomp_4v6090wbz1",
  "about": "## Bajaj Platinum Health Plan

Comprehensive coverage up to â‚ą25L per year with:
- Cashless hospitalisation at 10,000+ hospitals
- OPD cover up to â‚ą20,000/year
- Annual health check-up
- No room rent capping"
}

request.description:
**Required**: `companyId` (must be a valid insuranceCompanyId)
**Optional**: `about` (Markdown string describing the plan)

The `policyId` is auto-generated as `{companyId}_policy_{uuid}` which keeps it namespaced under its company.

response.name: 201 Created

request.description: Only `about` is updatable. `policyId`, `companyId`, and `createdAt` are immutable.
